infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: IrrigoPro uses the camera to attach photos to wet check zones.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: IrrigoPro accesses your photo library to attach existing photos to wet checks.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: IrrigoPro records your location when you save a billing sheet so the office can verify the work site.
